activity_main.tv_banner_title: Banner title TextView that shows the active saved place name or Selected Location
activity_main.status_text: TextView that shows location service running or stopped status
activity_main.btn_start_stop: Button to start or stop location service
activity_main.btn_smart_set_save: Button to save the currently selected place
activity_main.btn_saved_places: Button to open the list of saved places
activity_main.address_preview: TextView displaying coordinates or address under the map panel
activity_main.btn_my_location: Button to center the map on the user's real location
activity_main.btn_settings: Button to open app settings dialog

variables.selectedPlaceName: The name of the saved place currently active or selected by the user
variables.targetLocation: The active mock location targeted by the mock GPS service
variables.isLocationServiceRunning: Boolean flag tracking the running state of the mock service
